title: Financial Institutions Embrace Prediction Markets Amid Regulatory Uncertainty

title: Crypto Firms Blame Downsizing on AI, Some Abandon Crypto for AI Profits

title: Kalshi Defends Prediction Market Model Amid Gambling Concerns

title: Oil Surges to Highest Price Since 2023, Stocks Drop on Economic Worries

title: $25 Million Crypto Stablecoin Exploit Linked to Compromised AWS Keys
